title: BorderlessFullscreen
description: A Forge 1.8.9 mod to bring HDR-friendly Borderless Fullscreen to Minecraft. Similar to Cubes Without Borders, Borderless Mining, etc
body:
A Forge 1.8.9 mod to bring HDR-friendly Borderless Fullscreen to Minecraft. Similar to Cubes Without Borders, Borderless Mining, etc

Originated as a fork of Sk1er's Windowed Fullscreen mod, but almost all of the code has been rewritten.
